title: Brevo vs Drip (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Brevo vs Drip: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Brevo and Drip comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Brevo is built for transactional email and multi-channel marketing, while Drip targets e-commerce businesses wanting deep store integration. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_b: E-Commerce Businesses Wanting Deep Store Integration

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and multi-channel marketing
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on e-commerce businesses wanting deep store integration

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Brevo wins for transactional email and multi-channel marketing, while Drip is stronger for e-commerce businesses wanting deep store integration. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Drip?
faq.a: Brevo starts at a lower price point ($25/mo vs $39/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Drip to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Drip to Brevo is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
